Soft Gluten-Free Keto Bread

This easy keto bread recipe is soft, fluffy, and low carb. You will love how simple it is to make this gluten free bread at home with almond flour and eggs. Perfect for breakfast toast or sandwiches. Keep reading for the full recipe, tips, and nutrition facts. This bread is also dairy free and paleo friendly. Many readers say it is the best low carb bread they have tried. Follow the steps carefully for the best rise and texture every single time.

Mix the almond flour, baking powder, and salt. In another bowl whisk the eggs until light and fluffy. Combine the wet and dry ingredients and pour into a loaf pan. Bake at 350 degrees for forty minutes until golden brown on top. Let it cool completely before slicing so it does not crumble apart on you.

Store the bread in an airtight container for up to five days, or freeze slices for up to three months. Toast straight from frozen for best results. This recipe is naturally gluten free and works great for keto meal prep.
